gauge.name: Wind River above Red Creek

impacts.statement: Homes and property downstream will begin to see considerable flooding.
Flood Stage.  Low areas upstream and downstream will begin to flood. Houses and property downstream may begin to see minor flooding.

dataAttribution.text: USGS--Water Resources of the United States
dataAttribution.title: US Geological Survey
Observations courtesy of U.S. Geological Survey

hydronotes.statement: Stage may be affected by ice.

gauge.forecastReliability: Forecasts are issued as needed during times of high water, but are not routinely available.
